top_signals.title: Bank of England and Financial Conduct Authority – Memorandum of Understanding on the supervision of Financial Market Infrastructure
top_signals.summary: Joint statement from the Bank of England and Financial Conduct Authority
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: CISA directive for AI executive order to be released this week, Andersen says
top_signals.summary: The binding operational directive will focus in part on “vulnerability alleviation and vulnerability management,” Andersen said in remarks delivered at the TechNet Cyber conference in Baltimore.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
